arts.ttl: Real Madrid's five worst January transfers of all time
arts.sum: The Dutchman joined Los Blancos for €27m, but he played just 20 times for the club, scoring eight goals, before being sold to AC Milan for €15m after only seven months at the Santiago Bernabeu. However, after playing only 21 games for the club, Roberto returned to Brazil to join Flamengo on loan in 1998 and he subsequently secured a permanent move to Bayer Leverkusen for €7m.
